programs.title: The Grudge 2
programs.desc: In Tokyo, the sister of a girl previously killed by an evil curse must learn how to stop it once and for all.

programs.title: King Cobra
programs.desc: The result of an experimental drug is a creature that is half cobra, half rattlesnake, and 30 feet long.

programs.title: Mongolian Death Worm
programs.desc: During an oil fracking operation, a nest of deadly creatures that have been dormant for centuries is awakened!

programs.title: Jessabelle
programs.desc: Returning to her childhood home, Jessabelle comes face to face with a long-tormented spirit.

programs.title: The Messengers
programs.desc: An ominous darkness invades a farm in North Dakota, and the Solomon family is torn apart by mayhem and murder.

programs.title: Cube
programs.desc: A group of six complete strangers are involuntarily placed in an endless maze containing deadly traps.
